text:
Market today: The dominant driver today is Kashkari flagging a rate hike this year — that's a direct headwind for high-multiple tech and chip names, exactly your book. Higher rates compress valuations fastest in the names you're most exposed to. Risk-off tone, margin accounts feel this first.

Your holdings: AVGO at -14.91% is your largest position and flagged TRIM — that's your biggest dollar risk right now, especially on margin. PLTR is down -12.96% and flagged SELL — no catalyst to hold through a rate-hike environment. PTNM is -15.25% and tiny, but a fast move to the $9.50 stop closes it quick. SPCX is a brand-new, very volatile IPO with limited data — margin amplifies any gap-down hard.

Watch: 1) Any follow-through Fed commentary doubling down on Kashkari's rate-hike signal — that accelerates selling in AVGO, PLTR, CRWD. 2) Iran/Hormuz escalation headline — oil spike adds macro uncertainty that hits risk assets broadly.

Bottom line: Trim or exit your two biggest losers (AVGO, PLTR) before a rate-hike narrative takes hold and margin turns a bad week into a blown account.
